column1: Incorporated in 2005, Hemisphere Properties is a real estate entity with the mandate to hold, manage, and monetize surplus land identified during the disinvestment of Videsh Sanchar Nigam Limited (VSNL), presently known as Tata Communications Limited (TCL). These surplus land parcels were earmarked for transfer to a separate company to ensure their optimal utilization in a transparent and structured manner. [1]
